query: Nintendo Switch 2 Famitsu sales data May 11-17 2026 Japan hardware
answer:
## Research Findings: Nintendo Switch 2 Famitsu Sales — May 11–17, 2026 (Japan Hardware)

### Key Finding: Data Not Yet Published

The specific **May 11–17, 2026** Famitsu weekly hardware sales report has **not yet been published** as of the latest available data (May 20, 2026). Famitsu typically releases weekly sales data on Wednesdays or Thursdays following the tracked period, so this report may be imminent or may have just been released on May 21, 2026.

Notably, Famitsu published a **combined two-week report** for the Golden Week holiday period (April 27 – May 10), rather than separate weekly reports.

---

### Most Recent Available Data: April 27 – May 10, 2026 (2-Week Combined Golden Week)

| Platform | Units (2-week) | Cumulative (Lifetime Japan) |
|---|---|---|
| **Nintendo Switch 2** | **214,438** | **5,367,660** |
| Switch OLED | 16,850 | 9,571,489 |
| PS5 Digital | 16,539 | 1,283,342 |
| PS5 Pro | 5,248 | 355,220 |
| Xbox Series (all models) | 513 | ~698,834 |

- The 214,438 two-week figure averages ~**107,000 units/week**, a **4–5× increase** over the regular weekly pace of ~45,000–52,000 units seen in earlier April.
- Switch 2 outsold the entire PS5 family combined by approximately **9:1** in Japan.

---

### Weekly Trend Leading Up to This Period

| Week | Switch 2 Weekly Units | Cumulative |
|---|---|---|
| Mar 30 – Apr 5 | 59,543 | 5,011,059 |
| Apr 6 – Apr 12 | 52,058 | 5,063,117 |
| Apr 13 – Apr 19 | 44,280 | 5,107,397 |
| Apr 20 – Apr 26 | 45,825 | 5,153,222 |
| Apr 27 – May 10 (combined) | 214,438 | 5,367,660 |

---

### Critical Context: Pre-Price-Hike Rush Expected

A **pre-price-hike buying surge** is strongly anticipated for the May 11–24 window because:
1. Nintendo announced a **~20% price increase** for the Japan Switch 2 model (from ~¥49,980 to ~¥59,980), effective **May 25, 2026**.
2. Japanese consumers are expected to rush purchases before the hike takes effect.
3. The Golden Week period already showed massive demand acceleration.

---

### Sources
- **Gematsu** (famitsu-tracked sales charts)
- **Famitsu** (original weekly rankings)
- **Nintendo Life** (price hike coverage)
- **Eurogamer** (sales analysis)
- **Nintendo IR** (official financial data)

key_facts: The Famitsu weekly hardware sales report for May 11-17, 2026 has NOT yet been published as of the latest available data (May 20, 2026). It may be released imminently around May 21, 2026.
The most recent available Famitsu data is a combined 2-week Golden Week report covering April 27 - May 10, 2026.
Nintendo Switch 2 sold 214,438 units in Japan during the Apr 27 - May 10 two-week period (averaging ~107,000/week), a 4-5x increase over the regular weekly pace.
Switch 2 cumulative Japan sales reached 5,367,660 units as of May 10, 2026.
Switch 2 outsold the entire PS5 family combined by approximately 9:1 in Japan during the Golden Week period.
A pre-price-hike buying surge is expected for May 11-24, as Nintendo announced a ~20% price increase (¥49,980 to ¥59,980) effective May 25, 2026.
Regular weekly Switch 2 sales in April 2026 ranged from ~44,280 to ~59,543 units per week in Japan.

data_points.metric: Nintendo Switch 2 Japan sales (Apr 27 - May 10, 2-week combined)
